MYSTERIUM: Digital Deduction

You are a Psychic trying to solve a murder mystery by interpreting abstract vision cards sent by a Ghost. Each round, the Ghost will send you a vision card to help you identify the correct Suspect, Location, and Weapon. Study the vision carefully, then select your choice. Progress through all three stages before time runs out to solve the mystery and win!

Arrow Keys: Navigate through card selections | Space: Confirm your selection | Z: View current vision card in detail (hold)
